title: poa annua subsp. ovalis
intro: Poa annua subsp. ovalis, also known as annual bluegrass or small poa, is a subspecies of the annual grass Poa annua, which is commonly found in lawns, fields, and other areas with disturbed soil. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Poa annua subsp. ovalis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
